name: TEA Validation Workflow (Quality Gates → Release Readiness)
description: Comprehensive quality validation workflow combining quality gate setup and release readiness assessment. Ensures release meets quality standards before deployment.

phases.name: Quality Gate Identification
phases.description: Identify quality gate points (commit, PR, staging, production)

phases.name: Gate Criteria Definition
phases.description: Define criteria for each quality gate (coverage, defects, performance)

phases.name: Threshold Configuration
phases.description: Configure thresholds (min coverage %, max critical bugs)

phases.name: Gate Implementation
phases.description: Implement quality gates in CI/CD (hooks, automation)

phases.name: Gate Documentation
phases.description: Document quality gate process, thresholds, and overrides

phases.name: Feature Completeness Check
phases.description: Verify all features tested and acceptance criteria met

phases.name: Quality Metrics Review
phases.description: Review quality metrics (coverage, pass rate, defects)

phases.name: Operational Readiness Check
phases.description: Verify deployment, rollback, and monitoring readiness

phases.name: Release Recommendation
phases.description: Make Go/No-Go release recommendation based on all criteria

steps.name: Identify Quality Gate Points
steps.objective: Identify quality gate points in SDLC (commit, PR, staging, production)
instructions: Map software development lifecycle stages
Identify decision points requiring quality checks
Define gate points: commit, pre-PR, PR approval, staging, production
Specify gate triggers (automated vs manual)
Prioritize gates by risk and impact
Create gate point diagram with flow

steps.name: Define Gate Criteria
steps.objective: Define criteria for each quality gate (coverage, defects, performance)
instructions: For each gate point, define quality criteria
Specify code coverage requirements (line, branch, function)
Define defect limits (critical, high, medium)
Set performance benchmarks (response time, throughput)
Include security and accessibility criteria
Create criteria matrix (gate × criteria)

steps.name: Configure Thresholds
steps.objective: Configure thresholds (min coverage %, max critical bugs)
instructions: Set minimum code coverage threshold (e.g., 80%)
Set maximum defect thresholds (0 critical, 2 high, 10 medium)
Define performance thresholds (p95 < 500ms, p99 < 1s)
Configure security scan thresholds (0 critical vulnerabilities)
Define override conditions and approvers
Create threshold configuration file

steps.name: Implement Quality Gates
steps.objective: Implement quality gates in CI/CD (hooks, automation)
instructions: Configure CI/CD pipeline to enforce quality gates
Add pre-commit hooks (linting, unit tests)
Add PR status checks (coverage, tests, security)
Configure staging deployment gates (integration tests, smoke tests)
Add production deployment gates (manual approval, monitoring)
Test gate enforcement with sample PRs

steps.name: Document Quality Gates
steps.objective: Document quality gate process, thresholds, and overrides
instructions: Create quality gate handbook
Document each gate: purpose, criteria, thresholds
Explain override process and approvers
Provide troubleshooting guide for common gate failures
Document metrics collection and reporting
Include examples and screenshots

steps.name: Check Feature Completeness
steps.objective: Verify all features tested and acceptance criteria met
instructions: Review feature list from requirements/user stories
Verify each feature has test coverage
Check acceptance criteria met for each feature
Identify untested or partially tested features
Verify feature parity with requirements
Create feature completeness checklist

steps.name: Review Quality Metrics
steps.objective: Review quality metrics (coverage, pass rate, defects)
instructions: Collect current quality metrics from CI/CD
Review code coverage (line, branch, function)
Analyze test pass rate (overall, by type)
Review defect metrics (density, severity distribution)
Compare metrics against defined thresholds
Create quality metrics dashboard

steps.name: Analyze Open Defects
instructions: Review all open defects in issue tracker
Categorize by severity (critical, high, medium, low)
Assess risk of releasing with open defects
Identify release blockers (critical bugs, high-risk areas)
Verify critical and high bugs have fixes or mitigations
Create defect analysis report with recommendations

steps.name: Check Operational Readiness
steps.objective: Verify deployment, rollback, and monitoring readiness
instructions: Verify deployment scripts tested and ready
Confirm rollback procedure documented and tested
Check monitoring and alerting configured
Verify logging and observability in place
Confirm infrastructure capacity for expected load
Create operational readiness checklist

steps.name: Make Release Recommendation
steps.objective: Make Go/No-Go release recommendation based on all criteria
instructions: Review all quality gate results
Assess feature completeness (100% or acceptable gap)
Verify quality metrics meet thresholds
Confirm no release-blocking defects
Verify operational readiness
Make Go/No-Go recommendation with rationale
Document risks and mitigation for Go decision

success_criteria: Quality gates implemented and enforced in CI/CD
All features tested and acceptance criteria met
